description: Nhìn nhanh sức khỏe OTIF của mv_otif: freshness + 3 KPI RAG + chiều đang kéo OTIF xuống + trend + breakdown. Công thức canonical theo mondelez/scripts/analysis/otif_mtd_audit.py (mẫu số loại 'Không có dữ liệu STM'). Target/RAG theo prd.md §13.2 (OTIF 90 / Ontime 95 / Infull 97). RAG ở thresholds, KHÔNG trong SQL.

spec.rawSql: SELECT dateDiff('minute', max(thoi_gian_gui_thau), now()) AS lag_min, toString(toDate(max(thoi_gian_gui_thau))) AS max_date FROM analytics_workspace.mv_otif

spec.description: Lag = phút từ max(thoi_gian_gui_thau) tới now. Lưu ý cột UTC, dashboard hiển thị Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh.
spec.title: Freshness — data tới max_date, trễ ~lag′ (MV refresh 5′)

spec.rawSql: SELECT multiIf(ten_ngan_nha_van_tai IS NULL,'(NULL)', ten_ngan_nha_van_tai='','(rỗng)', ten_ngan_nha_van_tai) AS dim, round(100.0*countIf(otif_status='OTIF')/nullIf(countIf(otif_status != 'Không có dữ liệu STM'),0),2) AS pct_otif FROM analytics_workspace.mv_otif WHERE $__timeFilter(thoi_gian_gui_thau) AND $__conditionalAll(whseid IN (${whseid:singlequote}), $whseid) AND $__conditionalAll(group_name IN (${kenh:singlequote}), $kenh) GROUP BY dim ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT multiIf(group_of_cago IS NULL,'(NULL)', group_of_cago='','(rỗng)', group_of_cago) AS dim, round(100.0*countIf(otif_status='OTIF')/nullIf(countIf(otif_status != 'Không có dữ liệu STM'),0),2) AS pct_otif FROM analytics_workspace.mv_otif WHERE $__timeFilter(thoi_gian_gui_thau) AND $__conditionalAll(whseid IN (${whseid:singlequote}), $whseid) AND $__conditionalAll(group_name IN (${kenh:singlequote}), $kenh) AND $__conditionalAll(ten_ngan_nha_van_tai IN (${nvt:singlequote}), $nvt) GROUP BY dim ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT multiIf(group_name IS NULL,'(NULL)', group_name='','(rỗng)', group_name) AS dim, round(100.0*countIf(otif_status='OTIF')/nullIf(countIf(otif_status != 'Không có dữ liệu STM'),0),2) AS pct_otif FROM analytics_workspace.mv_otif WHERE $__timeFilter(thoi_gian_gui_thau) AND $__conditionalAll(whseid IN (${whseid:singlequote}), $whseid) AND $__conditionalAll(ten_ngan_nha_van_tai IN (${nvt:singlequote}), $nvt) GROUP BY dim ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT 'so NULL/empty' AS check, countIf(so IS NULL OR so='') AS cnt FROM analytics_workspace.mv_otif WHERE $__timeFilter(thoi_gian_gui_thau) UNION ALL SELECT 'whseid empty', countIf(whseid='') FROM analytics_workspace.mv_otif WHERE $__timeFilter(thoi_gian_gui_thau) UNION ALL SELECT 'otif_status empty', countIf(otif_status='') FROM analytics_workspace.mv_otif WHERE $__timeFilter(thoi_gian_gui_thau) UNION ALL SELECT 'otif_but_not_ontime', countIf(otif_status='OTIF' AND ontime_status!='Ontime') FROM analytics_workspace.mv_otif WHERE $__timeFilter(thoi_gian_gui_thau) UNION ALL SELECT 'otif_but_not_infull', countIf(otif_status='OTIF' AND infull_status!='Infull') FROM analytics_workspace.mv_otif WHERE $__timeFilter(thoi_gian_gui_thau) UNION ALL SELECT 'ontime_but_ata_null', countIf(ontime_status='Ontime' AND ata_den IS NULL) FROM analytics_workspace.mv_otif WHERE $__timeFilter(thoi_gian_gui_thau) UNION ALL SELECT 'tender_future', countIf(toDate(thoi_gian_gui_thau) > today()) FROM analytics_workspace.mv_otif WHERE $__timeFilter(thoi_gian_gui_thau)

spec.description: Subset 6 nhóm anomaly của otif_mtd_audit.py: NULL/empty cột then chốt + business-rule cross-field. cnt > 0 = đỏ, cần truy bằng script.
spec.title: Anomaly — đếm kỳ vọng = 0 (drill chi tiết bằng otif_mtd_audit.py nếu > 0)

spec.rawSql: SELECT uniqExact(so) AS total_so FROM analytics_workspace.mv_otif WHERE $__timeFilter(thoi_gian_gui_thau) AND otif_status != 'Không có dữ liệu STM' AND $__conditionalAll(whseid IN (${whseid:singlequote}), $whseid) AND $__conditionalAll(group_name IN (${kenh:singlequote}), $kenh) AND $__conditionalAll(ten_ngan_nha_van_tai IN (${nvt:singlequote}), $nvt)

spec.description: Số SO duy nhất trong window, đã loại otif_status='Không có dữ liệu STM' (khớp mẫu số % KPI).
spec.title: Tổng đơn (uniqExact SO, đã loại STM-missing)

spec.rawSql: SELECT round(100.0*countIf(otif_status='OTIF')/nullIf(count(so),0),2) AS pct_otif FROM analytics_workspace.mv_otif WHERE $__timeFilter(thoi_gian_gui_thau) AND otif_status != 'Không có dữ liệu STM' AND $__conditionalAll(whseid IN (${whseid:singlequote}), $whseid) AND $__conditionalAll(group_name IN (${kenh:singlequote}), $kenh) AND $__conditionalAll(ten_ngan_nha_van_tai IN (${nvt:singlequote}), $nvt)

SELECT round(100.0*countIf(ontime_status='Ontime')/nullIf(count(so),0),2) AS pct_ontime FROM analytics_workspace.mv_otif WHERE $__timeFilter(thoi_gian_gui_thau) AND otif_status != 'Không có dữ liệu STM' AND $__conditionalAll(whseid IN (${whseid:singlequote}), $whseid) AND $__conditionalAll(group_name IN (${kenh:singlequote}), $kenh) AND $__conditionalAll(ten_ngan_nha_van_tai IN (${nvt:singlequote}), $nvt)

SELECT round(100.0*countIf(infull_status='Infull')/nullIf(count(so),0),2) AS pct_infull FROM analytics_workspace.mv_otif WHERE $__timeFilter(thoi_gian_gui_thau) AND otif_status != 'Không có dữ liệu STM' AND $__conditionalAll(whseid IN (${whseid:singlequote}), $whseid) AND $__conditionalAll(group_name IN (${kenh:singlequote}), $kenh) AND $__conditionalAll(ten_ngan_nha_van_tai IN (${nvt:singlequote}), $nvt)

SELECT chieu, gia_tri, total_so, otif_so, (total_so - otif_so) AS fail_so, pct_otif FROM ( SELECT 'NVC' AS chieu, multiIf(ten_ngan_nha_van_tai IS NULL,'(NULL)', ten_ngan_nha_van_tai='','(rỗng)', ten_ngan_nha_van_tai) AS gia_tri, count(so) AS total_so, countIf(otif_status='OTIF') AS otif_so, round(100.0*countIf(otif_status='OTIF')/nullIf(count(so),0),2) AS pct_otif FROM analytics_workspace.mv_otif WHERE $__timeFilter(thoi_gian_gui_thau) AND otif_status != 'Không có dữ liệu STM' AND $__conditionalAll(whseid IN (${whseid:singlequote}), $whseid) AND $__conditionalAll(group_name IN (${kenh:singlequote}), $kenh) AND $__conditionalAll(ten_ngan_nha_van_tai IN (${nvt:singlequote}), $nvt) GROUP BY gia_tri UNION ALL SELECT 'Kho' AS chieu, multiIf(whseid IS NULL,'(NULL)', whseid='','(rỗng)', whseid) AS gia_tri, count(so) AS total_so, countIf(otif_status='OTIF') AS otif_so, round(100.0*countIf(otif_status='OTIF')/nullIf(count(so),0),2) AS pct_otif FROM analytics_workspace.mv_otif WHERE $__timeFilter(thoi_gian_gui_thau) AND otif_status != 'Không có dữ liệu STM' AND $__conditionalAll(whseid IN (${whseid:singlequote}), $whseid) AND $__conditionalAll(group_name IN (${kenh:singlequote}), $kenh) AND $__conditionalAll(ten_ngan_nha_van_tai IN (${nvt:singlequote}), $nvt) GROUP BY gia_tri UNION ALL SELECT 'Loại hàng' AS chieu, multiIf(group_of_cago IS NULL,'(NULL)', group_of_cago='','(rỗng)', group_of_cago) AS gia_tri, count(so) AS total_so, countIf(otif_status='OTIF') AS otif_so, round(100.0*countIf(otif_status='OTIF')/nullIf(count(so),0),2) AS pct_otif FROM analytics_workspace.mv_otif WHERE $__timeFilter(thoi_gian_gui_thau) AND otif_status != 'Không có dữ liệu STM' AND $__conditionalAll(whseid IN (${whseid:singlequote}), $whseid) AND $__conditionalAll(group_name IN (${kenh:singlequote}), $kenh) AND $__conditionalAll(ten_ngan_nha_van_tai IN (${nvt:singlequote}), $nvt) GROUP BY gia_tri UNION ALL SELECT 'Kênh' AS chieu, multiIf(group_name IS NULL,'(NULL)', group_name='','(rỗng)', group_name) AS gia_tri, count(so) AS total_so, countIf(otif_status='OTIF') AS otif_so, round(100.0*countIf(otif_status='OTIF')/nullIf(count(so),0),2) AS pct_otif FROM analytics_workspace.mv_otif WHERE $__timeFilter(thoi_gian_gui_thau) AND otif_status != 'Không có dữ liệu STM' AND $__conditionalAll(whseid IN (${whseid:singlequote}), $whseid) AND $__conditionalAll(group_name IN (${kenh:singlequote}), $kenh) AND $__conditionalAll(ten_ngan_nha_van_tai IN (${nvt:singlequote}), $nvt) GROUP BY gia_tri ) WHERE pct_otif < 90 AND total_so >= 5 ORDER BY pct_otif ASC, total_so DESC LIMIT 20

spec.description: Exception Spotlight (PRD §13.8): gộp 4 chiều NVC / Kho / Loại hàng / Kênh, chỉ giữ nhóm %OTIF < target 90% và ≥5 đơn, sắp xếp tệ nhất trước. fail_so = đơn KHÔNG đạt OTIF trong nhóm.
spec.title: Chiều đang kéo OTIF xuống — cross-dim < 90% (worst-first, ≥5 đơn)

spec.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfDay(thoi_gian_gui_thau) AS time, round(100.0*countIf(otif_status='OTIF')/nullIf(count(so),0),2) AS "% OTIF", round(100.0*countIf(ontime_status='Ontime')/nullIf(count(so),0),2) AS "% Ontime", round(100.0*countIf(infull_status='Infull')/nullIf(count(so),0),2) AS "% Infull" FROM analytics_workspace.mv_otif WHERE $__timeFilter(thoi_gian_gui_thau) AND otif_status != 'Không có dữ liệu STM' AND $__conditionalAll(whseid IN (${whseid:singlequote}), $whseid) AND $__conditionalAll(group_name IN (${kenh:singlequote}), $kenh) AND $__conditionalAll(ten_ngan_nha_van_tai IN (${nvt:singlequote}), $nvt) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

spec.description: Trend daily, mẫu số loại STM-missing. Đường threshold tại 90 (target OTIF). Đối chiếu mắt: dưới đường = chưa đạt.
spec.title: Xu hướng %OTIF/Ontime/Infull theo ngày — đường xanh = target 90%

spec.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfDay(thoi_gian_gui_thau) AS time, uniqExact(so) AS "Tổng đơn" FROM analytics_workspace.mv_otif WHERE $__timeFilter(thoi_gian_gui_thau) AND otif_status != 'Không có dữ liệu STM' AND $__conditionalAll(whseid IN (${whseid:singlequote}), $whseid) AND $__conditionalAll(group_name IN (${kenh:singlequote}), $kenh) AND $__conditionalAll(ten_ngan_nha_van_tai IN (${nvt:singlequote}), $nvt) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

spec.description: Số SO duy nhất mỗi ngày (loại STM-missing). Spike/hụt volume giúp đọc bối cảnh khi %OTIF dao động.
spec.title: Tổng đơn theo ngày (uniqExact SO) — volume context cho trend

spec.rawSql: SELECT multiIf(whseid IS NULL,'(NULL)', whseid='','(rỗng)', whseid) AS dim, round(100.0*countIf(otif_status='OTIF')/nullIf(countIf(otif_status != 'Không có dữ liệu STM'),0),2) AS pct_otif FROM analytics_workspace.mv_otif WHERE $__timeFilter(thoi_gian_gui_thau) AND $__conditionalAll(group_name IN (${kenh:singlequote}), $kenh) AND $__conditionalAll(ten_ngan_nha_van_tai IN (${nvt:singlequote}), $nvt) GROUP BY dim ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 20

spec.title: %OTIF theo Kho — đỏ < 85% (top 20 theo số dòng)
Data quality — anomaly (kỳ vọng = 0) · mở khi cần kiểm tra số liệu

title: OTIF Quick View — Mondelez

spec.__legacyStringValue: SELECT DISTINCT whseid FROM analytics_workspace.mv_otif WHERE whseid != '' ORDER BY whseid
SELECT DISTINCT group_name FROM analytics_workspace.mv_otif WHERE group_name != '' ORDER BY group_name
SELECT DISTINCT ten_ngan_nha_van_tai FROM analytics_workspace.mv_otif WHERE ten_ngan_nha_van_tai != '' ORDER BY 1
